dc:title: Psychological Science - Open-Access Subset Corpus (2014-2026)
dc:creator: Lakens, Daniel
dc:subject: psychology
open access
natural language processing
AI validation
text mining
dc:description: A corpus of 270 articles published in Psychological Science, filtered from a larger locally-held collection of 1,903 PDFs down to only those independently confirmed via CrossRef's license metadata to carry an open Creative Commons license (CC-BY or CC-BY-NC), converted to metacheck paperlist objects for validation of AI and text-mining tools. Most Psychological Science articles are not open access (SAGE's default text-and-data-mining license is not a redistributable CC license), so this is a minority subset, not a representative sample of the journal.
dc:rights: CC-BY 4.0 or CC-BY-NC 4.0/3.0, depending on the article -- see manifest.csv license_url column

dc:provenance.pdf_source: Filtered from a pre-existing local collection of 1,903 Psychological Science PDFs
dc:provenance.license_verification: Each DOI checked against CrossRef's license field; only creativecommons.org licenses counted as open (SAGE's text-and-data-mining-only license excluded)
dc:provenance.doi_matching: Verified against CrossRef DOI used for the license check (2026-06-20)
dc:provenance.sampling: Not a sample -- all 271 open-access articles found in the source collection (1 later excluded as a non-article erratum notice)
